title: Lessons Learned Store
description: Source of truth for all lessons (seed + discovered)

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation

type.description: Discriminator field for file type identification

lessons.description: All lessons, ordered by creation time (ULID is naturally sorted)

id.description: ULID — collision-free, naturally sorted by creation time

slug.description: Human-readable kebab-case slug + 4-char random suffix. Used in dedup claim filenames, log output, and CLI references.

summary.description: One-line description. Used as fallback injection when full text exceeds budget.

mistake.description: Root cause explanation. Describes the failure mode, not just the symptom.

remediation.description: Concrete fix. Actionable commands or code changes. Should be copy-pasteable.

injection.description: Pre-rendered markdown for hook injection. Only field read in the hot path. <200 bytes. Generated from summary + remediation at build time.

priority.description: 1-3: Low (rare, heuristic-only). 4-6: Medium (validated, situational). 7-8: High (common recurring). 9-10: Critical (hangs, data loss).

confidence.description: How sure we are this is a real, recurring pattern. >=0.9: manually curated. 0.7-0.9: strong heuristic. <0.7: needs review.

needsReview.description: True for auto-discovered lessons below confidence threshold. Stored but not injected until confirmed.

tags.description: Datadog-style labeled tags. Categories: lang:, tool:, topic:, env:, severity:, platform:

sourceSessionIds.description: Sessions where this pattern was observed. Empty for seed lessons.

occurrenceCount.description: Times scanner detected this pattern across sessions

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of (mistake + remediation + triggers). Scanner uses this for dedup.

toolNames.description: Tools this lesson applies to. First-pass filter: O(1) Set lookup.

commandPatterns.description: Regex patterns tested against Bash tool_input.command. Negative lookahead prevents injection when fix is already applied.

pathPatterns.description: Glob/regex patterns tested against file_path for Read/Edit/Write/Glob tools.

contentPatterns.description: Regex patterns for file content or output. TBD based on harvesting results.
